backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing an ICDex grid trading bot with order placement/cancellation, bot start/stop controls, configurable spread/interval/order count, open order tracking, trade history, and an activity log with pagination.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the frontend codebase structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors for background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the ICDex ICP/ckUSDT Trading Bot SPA, mounting the React app at the `#root` div and loading the Vite entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full dashboard layout with a sticky header, responsive multi-row grid of panels (control, config, market data, grid preview, open orders, trade history, activity log), and a footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/ActivityLogPanel: React panel component that fetches and displays paginated bot activity log entries with timestamp formatting, event-type color coding, loading skeletons, error state, and empty state.
React panel for starting and stopping the trading bot, displaying live status, config summary, and user-friendly error messages distinguishing network reachability errors from other failures.
frontend/src/components/ConfigurationPan: Renders a configuration form for bot settings (spread, grid orders, refresh interval) with validation, loading skeletons, and a save button that simulates saving since config changes require redeployment.
frontend/src/components/GridPreviewTable: Displays the current grid levels (buy/sell) fetched from the backend in a scrollable table, with loading skeletons, error states, mid-price calculation, and a manual refresh button.
Shows live market data (mid price, best bid/ask, order book levels) with dynamic status indicators (LIVE/IDLE/STALE/ERROR) and a relative-time staleness tracker updated every second.
Lists open orders sorted by side and price with buy/sell counts, supports cancelling all orders via a mutation, and shows loading skeletons, error states, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/TradeHistoryPane: Displays trade history sorted reverse-chronologically with price, quantity, status (filled/cancelled/open), and relative timestamps, including loading skeletons and error/empty states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates/refetches all dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating trading bot state (status, config, orders, logs) via the ICP canister actor, with polling intervals and canister health checks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up a terminal-themed dark UI using Tailwind, JetBrains Mono font, OKLCH CSS variables for colors, and custom scrollbar and component styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with terminal trading colors (buy/sell/neutral), JetBrains Mono fonts, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, and custom box shadows.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing an ICDex grid trading bot with a known bug where the bot fails to place new buy/sell orders after cancelling open orders, with two pending fix/logging action requests.
